_note: REAL client tenant skindesign (Skin Design Tattoo). Concrete VoiceDimensions fill emitted from brand-dna.md, matching the arch-locked shape (a9m.1 Decision 3). Authored by writer 2026-07-03 from client-data/ ONLY (artists.csv, customers.csv, campaign-examples.json — 5 real SMS campaigns). No value is invented; gaps live as TODO(operator-verify) in brand-dna.md. Loader consumes raw['dimensions']; the sibling keys below (tenant_id, source, _claim_sources, claims_discipline) are metadata.

tone: warm, friendly, upbeat, low-pressure; opens with a greeting ('Hi!', 'Hey!') and often a smile (':)') — SMS-native, direct, concise

speaks on behalf of a NAMED artist as a warm intermediary ('Angel opened a short booking window', 'Lynn wanted me to personally reach out') — never a faceless corporate 'we', never the artist's own first person
CTA: a concrete keyword reply/text tied to the artist ('Reply ANGEL to check availability or get a quote', 'Text KEEBS for available dates or payment plan options'); offer the payment-plan option
not: superlatives, hype-walls, corporate/SaaS sludge, or ladies8391's women-first/neo-traditional positioning (a different, synthetic tenant)
structure: short lines, one idea each; a light limited-spots scarcity beat; caps used sparingly for emphasis on the offer ('FULL-DAY SPECIAL', '2 SPOTS LEFT')
lead with the artist and their opening; state the offer plainly; add the payment-plan option; end with a keyword CTA
on SMS ALWAYS include the STOP opt-out; never message a suppressed/DND number (DND is a first-class deliverability concern for this client)
sequence pattern: initial blast then a scarcity follow-up to the same audience 1-6 days later

ban: price or discount not tied to an approved campaign offer (prices are per-campaign specials, never a standing rate)
awards, credentials, years-in-business, or style specialty claims (none are in client-data)
location city/state, ownership/founder, or any TODO(operator-verify) fact until the operator fills it
AI-tells: em-dash-as-drama, rule-of-three padding, contrast framing ('it's not just X, it's Y'), generic corporate transitions
dropping the STOP opt-out on an SMS message
ladies8391 positioning: women-first, neo-traditional, reclaiming / post-mastectomy framing
TODO(operator-verify): the client's OWN explicit banned-word list is not in client-data — the bans above are platform-default guardrails, to be replaced/extended with the real don'ts
approved_claims: Skin Design Tattoo is a multi-location tattoo studio, with locations at Spring Mountain, Orange County, Soho, Hawaii, New York, and Nashville.
Full-day sessions are great for larger pieces, finishing or adding to existing work, or starting a new custom piece.
Payment plans are available through Klarna and Affirm.
Check availability, get a quote, or ask about payment-plan options by replying with / texting the artist's name.
vocabulary.emoji_policy: 0-2, sparing. Observed in real copy: 🔥 (opener) and ':)' smiley. Not a hype-wall.
vocabulary.hashtag_policy: TODO(operator-verify): no evidence — the client's real channel is SMS (no hashtags). Default to NONE on any social channel until the operator provides an approved tag set; never invent tags.

source: skills/brand-voice/tenants/skindesign/brand-dna.md (Voice & tone rules + Do/Do-not + Approved claims sections)
claims_discipline: approved_claims is the allow-list: a draft MUST block + escalate on any factual/credential/offer claim not in this list. Prices are NOT standing claims — a price appears only when it traces to an approved campaign offer.

_claim_sources.Payment plans are available through Klar: client-data/campaign-examples.json — Angel campaign message_copy / payment_plans field
_claim_sources.Check availability, get a quote, or ask: client-data/campaign-examples.json — Angel cta ('Reply ANGEL…'), Keebs cta ('Text KEEBS for available dates or payment plan options')
